item.title: It's disgusting, it's sick, and it shows it doesn't matter what someone is wearing, it's about power!! This poor poor woman, fair play to her for waiving anonymity so others know they're not alone!

https://www.lemonde.fr/en/videos/video/2024/09/07/the-case-of-dominique-pelicot-who-drugged-his-wife-and-invited-at-others-to-rape-her-for-nearly-a-decade_6725149_108.html

item.title: Rebel Ridge is a movie about civil forfeiture. IRL police in Indiana trained dogs to sniff for money in Fedex packages and steal them.

item.title: Fun fact if you don't live in Chicago
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/nHHMuBgIbmY Almost half of Chicago’s parking meters are owned by the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority. The other half are owned by a shadowy company called Redoma

Good morning imgur, let's fireball this bread.
Pippin (and wizard) tax. Today's message from Pippin: "whatchoo doing? I'm sorry. Uh oh."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Now we all know about Flo
item.description: No one was more surprised than Christina Novak when the short online obituary she placed in the Kennebec Journal about her mom’s death went viral. “Let’s be clear. It’s a PSA and it’s no joke. It was written with sarcasm and relief, but it’s real,” Novak, 47, tells PEOPLE exclusively. “It was done in four sentences because I refused to spend another dollar on that woman.” https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/daughters-4-sentence-obit-mom-120000728.html
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Happy Star Trek Day from Litterbox! [OC]
item.description:
The pilot is funded, but the more we raise, the better we can make it! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp
One of the many exclusive rewards for Kickstarter campaign! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp (Sorry I keep going on about it, but after any limited edition thing, there's always people upset they missed it! Need to get the word out as much as possible!) :)
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
